ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name != "System Administrator", $Profile.Name != "Integration User" , $Profile.Name != "SW Billing Extended" , $Profile.Name != "SW Billing" , $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" , $Profile.Name != "Integration User" , $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" , $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" , ISPICKVAL(Type , "Renewal"), ISCHANGED( StageName ), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL( Cycle__c ,"Annually"), Cycle_Price__c > Original_Renewal_Amount__c), AND( ISPICKVAL( Cycle__c ,"2 Years"), Cycle_Price__c / 2 > Original_Renewal_Amount__c), AND( ISPICKVAL( Cycle__c ,"3 Years"), Cycle_Price__c/3 > Original_Renewal_Amount__c) ), Delta_ARR__c != 1, Delta_ARR__c != -1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The ARR cannot be higher than the original renewal amount. Please create an upsell opportunity to reflect an increase in ARR
